message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="Agreed, ready to review Step 7">
Agreed on all points. The service bypass is a "fetch for display" pattern, not an auth gap, so it's correctly categorized as tidy work rather than a bug. Separate commit after Step 7 is the right approach -- Tidy First, not Tidy Mixed In.

Ready to review Step 7 when Carson pushes. I'll be watching for:
1. Transaction correctness (three writes under one tx)
2. Existing clarify-as-next-action tests still passing after the form contract change
3. No new direct repository calls from routes
4. Test coverage following the phased TDD approach I recommended to Carson
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. Kent is ready to review but Step 7 code is already written and he already APPROVED it. We're just waiting for Carson to fix Steve Krug's one blocking item (validation error dead-end page).
